title: antidesma stilago
intro: Antidesma stilago, also known as the Philippine ironwood or iron tree, is a species of plant native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Antidesma stilago include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared into various forms, including tea, infusions, and decoctions, or used in the form of extracts or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
